sources.limitations: Applicant and preparer supplied summary; narrative intake does not support closed-world absence for any factual universe.
sources.title: N-400 intake summary

sources.limitations: Applicant-declared travel table; closed-world absence is limited to what the applicant declared and cannot rule out undeclared or unrecorded trips.
sources.title: N-400 travel table

sources.limitations: Structured worksheet derived from applicant-declared data; reports computed months present and in-district but does not independently verify presence or rule out unreported absences.
sources.title: Physical presence worksheet

sources.limitations: Current test result only; supports positive pass facts but does not support closed-world absence of other issues.
sources.title: English and civics test result

sources.limitations: Current oath worksheet only; records willingness and attachment statements but does not support closed-world absence of disqualifying conduct or beliefs.
sources.title: Oath and attachment worksheet

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world absence limited to convictions reportable in the FBI criminal history system and does not cover charges, foreign convictions, or non-conviction conduct.
sources.title: FBI criminal history check

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world absence limited to pending criminal charges within the searched dockets and does not cover sealed, foreign, or unsearched jurisdictions.
sources.title: Court docket search

sources.limitations: Synthetic benchmark source; closed-world absence limited to false testimony observations recorded at the USCIS interview and does not cover misrepresentations made outside the interview.
sources.title: USCIS interview worksheet
